scope: Rebuilds Seneca Foods FY2025 reported, FIFO-adjusted pre-tax, and FIFO-adjusted after-tax financials from the upstream claims source pack. The single anchored numeric input is the $359.3m FY2025 LIFO reserve (S-001). All other line items are flagged 'pending' with the exact filing, item, and computation needed to resolve them; no synthetic numbers are emitted.

newSourcesIntroduced.title: SENEA Class A common stock closing price as of the rebuild reference date
newSourcesIntroduced.urlOrCitation: SENEA Class A closing price on or near 2026-04-30 (to be retrieved from a consolidated market data feed; archive snapshot required)

newSourcesIntroduced.title: U.S. federal corporate statutory income tax rate (21%) and SENEA's most recent effective tax rate per FY2025 10-K
newSourcesIntroduced.publisher: Internal Revenue Code Section 11 / Seneca Foods FY2025 10-K (cross-reference to S-001)
newSourcesIntroduced.urlOrCitation: 26 U.S.C. Section 11 (https://www.law.cornell.edu/uscode/text/26/11) and SENEA FY2025 10-K Income Taxes note effective-rate reconciliation
usedFor: deferred-tax offset on LIFO reserve add-back to equity

newSourcesIntroduced.title: SENEA Class A and Class B shares outstanding per the FY2025 10-K cover page and most recent 10-Q
newSourcesIntroduced.publisher: Seneca Foods Corporation / U.S. SEC (subset of S-001 and S-007)
newSourcesIntroduced.urlOrCitation: FY2025 10-K cover page share counts and most recent 10-Q cover page (https://www.sec.gov/cgi-bin/browse-edgar?action=getcompany&CIK=0000088948)
usedFor: per-share denominators across asset-value, earnings-power, and per-share-compounding bridges

reportedMetrics.label: LIFO reserve, year-end
reportedMetrics.notes: Anchored verbatim in plan Quick Source Anchors and upstream claims pack (claim C-003).

reportedMetrics.label: LIFO reserve, prior year-end
reportedMetrics.notes: Comparative-year value from the FY2025 10-K LIFO note required to compute the FY2025 LIFO charge.

reportedMetrics.label: LIFO charge (period change in LIFO reserve)
reportedMetrics.notes: Computed as lifo_reserve_FY2025 - lifo_reserve_FY2024.

reportedMetrics.label: Effective income tax rate
reportedMetrics.notes: From FY2025 10-K Income Taxes note effective-rate reconciliation; floor is 21% federal statutory per S-010.

reportedMetrics.label: Reported pre-tax income (LIFO basis)
reportedMetrics.notes: From the consolidated income statement of the FY2025 10-K.

reportedMetrics.label: Reported net earnings (LIFO basis)
reportedMetrics.notes: From the consolidated income statement of the FY2025 10-K.

reportedMetrics.label: Reported operating income
reportedMetrics.notes: Used as the EBITDA starting point before D&A add-back.

reportedMetrics.label: Depreciation and amortization
reportedMetrics.notes: From the consolidated cash-flow statement of the FY2025 10-K.

reportedMetrics.label: Reported EBITDA
reportedMetrics.notes: Operating income + D&A; LIFO basis (will be bridged to FIFO under adjustedMetrics).

reportedMetrics.label: Inventories, net (LIFO basis)
reportedMetrics.notes: From the consolidated balance sheet of the FY2025 10-K.

reportedMetrics.label: Total current assets
reportedMetrics.notes: From the consolidated balance sheet of the FY2025 10-K.

reportedMetrics.label: Total liabilities
reportedMetrics.notes: Sum of current and long-term liabilities from the FY2025 balance sheet.

reportedMetrics.label: Total stockholders' equity
reportedMetrics.notes: From the consolidated balance sheet of the FY2025 10-K.

reportedMetrics.label: Goodwill
reportedMetrics.notes: From the consolidated balance sheet of the FY2025 10-K.

reportedMetrics.label: Other intangible assets, net
reportedMetrics.notes: From the consolidated balance sheet of the FY2025 10-K.

reportedMetrics.label: Short-term debt and current portion of long-term debt
reportedMetrics.notes: From the consolidated balance sheet of the FY2025 10-K.

reportedMetrics.label: Long-term debt and finance leases
reportedMetrics.notes: From the consolidated balance sheet and long-term debt footnote of the FY2025 10-K.

reportedMetrics.label: Cash, cash equivalents, and marketable securities
reportedMetrics.notes: From the consolidated balance sheet of the FY2025 10-K.

reportedMetrics.label: Net debt
reportedMetrics.notes: (Short-term debt + Long-term debt) - (Cash + Marketable securities).

reportedMetrics.label: Class A common stock outstanding
reportedMetrics.notes: From the FY2025 10-K cover page.

reportedMetrics.label: Class B common stock outstanding
reportedMetrics.notes: From the FY2025 10-K cover page.

reportedMetrics.label: Cumulative buyback authorization (active program)
reportedMetrics.notes: From 10-K Item 5 / Item 7 disclosures and the FY2025 proxy.

reportedMetrics.label: Shares repurchased in FY2025
reportedMetrics.notes: From 10-K Item 5 monthly repurchase table and consolidated cash-flow statement.

reportedMetrics.label: Average price paid per share repurchased
reportedMetrics.notes: From 10-K Item 5 monthly repurchase table.

reportedMetrics.label: Net buyback as percent of beginning shares outstanding
reportedMetrics.notes: (Shares repurchased - Shares issued for compensation) / Shares outstanding at start of fiscal year.

reportedMetrics.label: SENEA Class A closing price on rebuild reference date
reportedMetrics.notes: Archive snapshot required for reproducibility.

adjustedMetrics.label: FIFO inventory adjustment (gross, equal to LIFO reserve)
adjustedMetrics.notes: Identically the FY2025 LIFO reserve; anchored in plan Quick Source Anchors.

adjustedMetrics.label: FIFO inventory adjustment (after deferred-tax offset)
adjustedMetrics.notes: 359.3 * (1 - effective_tax_rate); resolves once tax rate retrieved.

adjustedMetrics.label: FIFO-adjusted EBITDA
adjustedMetrics.notes: reported_ebitda + lifo_charge. Pre-tax bridge by definition.

adjustedMetrics.label: FIFO-adjusted diluted EPS
adjustedMetrics.notes: fifo_net_earnings / (Class A + Class B diluted shares).

adjustedMetrics.label: Tangible book value, FIFO-adjusted (pre-tax)
adjustedMetrics.notes: tangible_book_reported + 359.3 (gross LIFO reserve add-back). Upper bound.

adjustedMetrics.label: Tangible book value, FIFO-adjusted (after deferred tax)
adjustedMetrics.notes: tangible_book_reported + 359.3 * (1 - effective_tax_rate). Conservative FIFO equity benchmark.

adjustedMetrics.label: NCAV, FIFO-adjusted (pre-tax)
adjustedMetrics.notes: ncav_reported + 359.3 (gross LIFO reserve add-back to inventory inside current assets).

adjustedMetrics.label: Book value per share CAGR, FY2005-FY2025
adjustedMetrics.notes: Endpoint values come from reconstructed balance sheets across the 20-year window. Both reported (LIFO) and FIFO-adjusted CAGRs are computed.

tangibleBookBridge.method: Reported equity minus goodwill and intangibles, then add LIFO reserve net of deferred tax, then divide by Class A + Class B shares outstanding.

ncavBridge.method: Total current assets minus total liabilities, then add LIFO reserve net of deferred tax (the reserve sits inside current assets via inventory).

earningsPowerBridge.method: Add the FY2025 LIFO charge to reported pre-tax income to obtain FIFO-adjusted pre-tax income; multiply by (1 - effective tax rate) to obtain FIFO-adjusted net earnings.

perShareCompoundingBridge.method: Reconstruct per-share book value from FY2005 to FY2025 using both LIFO-basis and FIFO-adjusted equity; compute CAGR.

financialClaims.claimText: Seneca trades below tangible book value on a FIFO-adjusted basis.
financialClaims.rebuildReason: Tangible book bridge is methodologically defined and the LIFO add-back is anchored at $359.3m, but reported equity, goodwill, intangibles, share count, and a market-price snapshot are still required.

financialClaims.claimText: Seneca trades at or below NCAV when inventory is restated to FIFO.
financialClaims.rebuildReason: NCAV bridge is methodologically defined and the FIFO add-back is anchored at $359.3m, but total current assets, total liabilities, share count, and a market-price snapshot are still required.

financialClaims.claimText: Reported earnings materially understate FIFO earnings power because of a $359.3m LIFO reserve.
financialClaims.rebuildReason: FY2025 LIFO reserve of $359.3m is anchored. The FY2025 LIFO charge (period change in reserve), reported pre-tax income, reported EBITDA, and effective tax rate are still required to complete pre-tax and after-tax FIFO bridges.

financialClaims.claimText: Seneca has compounded book value per share over a 20-year window despite minimal sell-side coverage.
financialClaims.rebuildReason: 20-year CAGR requires retrieving FY2005-FY2024 10-K filings via S-007 and the FY2025 endpoint via S-001.

financialClaims.claimText: Seneca has executed material share repurchases relative to float, supporting per-share compounding.
financialClaims.rebuildReason: Buyback authorization, executions, average price, and net-of-issuance figures require retrieving FY2025 10-K Item 5 / Item 7 disclosures and the FY2025 DEF 14A.

financialClaims.claimText: Seneca has demonstrated pricing-cost recovery across crop, steel/tinplate, freight, and labor cycles.
financialClaims.rebuildReason: Multi-year FIFO-adjusted EBITDA series and a maintenance-capex proxy require historical 10-K retrieval; not blocking C-001/C-002/C-003 bridges but tracked here for completeness.

openQuestions.question: Retrieve the FY2025 10-K LIFO note to obtain the prior-year LIFO reserve so the FY2025 LIFO charge can be computed.
Retrieve the FY2025 10-K Income Taxes note for the effective tax rate used in after-tax conversions.
Retrieve the FY2025 consolidated balance sheet for reported equity, goodwill, intangibles, total current assets, total liabilities, debt components, and cash/marketable securities.
Retrieve FY2025 Item 5 and the FY2025 DEF 14A for the buyback / equity-issuance reconciliation.
Retrieve FY2005-FY2024 10-K filings for the 20-year per-share compounding rebuild.
Capture an archived SENEA Class A closing-price datapoint on or near 2026-04-30 for per-share market comparisons.
Confirm the cover-page share counts on the FY2025 10-K and the most recent 10-Q so per-share denominators reconcile across all bridges.
Carry-forward upstream Q-002: does the FY2025 10-K disclose a maintenance-capex figure or proxy, or must the rebuild derive it from the PP&E roll-forward?
